LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SWEDISH SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 435.5, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A MOTION TO STRIKE IS FILED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY SEPTEMBER 19, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SWEDISH SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR FOR NONCOMPLIANCE WITH CCP 430.41, WHICH REQUIRES THAT THE PARTIES CONDUCT A "MEET AND CONFER IN PERSON OR BY TELEPHONE" BEFORE A DEMURRER IS FILED. THE PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO MEET AND CONFER IMMEDIATELY AND DEFENDANT'S RESPONSE TO THE COMPLAINT IS NOW DUE BY SEPTEMBER 19, 2022. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: S. LE, NOT REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

Off Calendar Oct-19-2022 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-22-2022 Continued To Dec-07-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SWEDISH SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO DEMURRER to COMPLAINT:

The Swedish Society of San Francisco's demurrer is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 430.41, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a demurrer is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by September 19, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT SWEDISH SOCIETY OF SAN FRANCISCO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT

The Swedish Society of San Francisco's motion to strike is ordered off calendar for noncompliance with CCP 435.5, which requires that the parties conduct a "meet and confer in person or by telephone" before a motion to strike is filed. The parties are ordered to meet and confer immediately and defendant's response to the complaint is now due by September 19, 2022.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
